title: How to Plan a Two-Week Japan Rail Trip
excerpt: JR Pass strategy, reservation windows, and pacing cities with recovery days.
content:
## Table of contents

1. Pass math
2. Route skeleton
3. Booking tactics

## Pass math

Compare regional passes against the nationwide JR Pass using your exact itinerary.

## Route skeleton

Alternate intense city blocks with nature or onsen towns to avoid burnout.

## Booking tactics

Reserve popular legs as soon as windows open; off-peak trains feel calmer.

title: Packing Light for Alpine Hiking
excerpt: Layering systems, water safety, and gear that earns its weight in the Rockies.
content:
## Layers

Merino base, breathable mid, and a packable shell.

## Safety

Tell someone your route; carry a whistle and headlamp.

## Footwear

Break in boots before the trip; blister kits are non-negotiable.

title: Budget Hacks for Mediterranean Islands
excerpt: Ferry timing, shoulder-season stays, and dining where locals eat.
content:
## Ferries

Midweek sailings often cost less than weekends.

## Stays

Look inland villages a short bus ride from famous viewpoints.

## Dining

Lunch menus can mirror dinner quality at half the price.
